title: CPF Housing Grant (Families) - Top-Up Grant
text:
CPF Housing Grant (Families) - Top-Up Grant - SupportGoWhere
CPF Housing Grant (Families) - Top-Up Grant
Share link
Provides up to $40,000 in housing grants to eligible families if they had previously received CPF Housing Grant for Singles and now qualify for the CPF Housing Grant for Families.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Up to $40,000 in Top-Up grant for eligible families
Grant is directly credited into all eligible Singapore Citizen and Permanent Resident applicants’ CPF Ordinary Accounts
Available for those who previously received a Singles Grant
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to $40,000 in Top-Up Grant

The applicant applying for the Top-Up Grant may also apply for other grants (e.g. Enhanced Housing Grant and Proximity Housing Grant), if eligible

If your household is eligible for the grant, all eligible Singapore Citizen and Permanent Resident applicants will receive equal shares of the grant, fully credited into their CPF Ordinary Accounts

Who is this for?

You must be a Singapore Citizen aged 21 and above, and your spouse or child is a Singapore Citizen / Permanent Resident

You have previously received the CPF Housing Grant for Resale Flats (Singles) or bought a 2-room flat (includes Flexi) from HDB as a single, and are now married

Your average gross monthly household income must not exceed HDB’s prevailing income ceiling of $14,000 for resale flat or $7,000 for 2-room Flexi flat from HDB

You and your spouse, as well as other persons listed in the application, must not have ownership or interest in any private residential property, local or overseas, and no disposal of such property within the last 30 months prior to the application

You and your spouse, as well as other persons listed in the application, must not have ownership or interest in more than one non-residential private property, local or overseas, and no disposal of such property within the last 30 months prior to the application

How to apply?

You must submit your application within 6 months of the first qualifying event (e.g. marriage to Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident spouse/ spouse or child obtaining Singapore Citizenship or Permanent Residency / birth of Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident child)

You can do so via the HDB InfoWEB > 'e-Services' > 'Residential' > 'Living in an HDB Flat' > 'Application for Top-Up Grant'

Where can I find help?

View more details

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
